title: Preventive detention law can't be invoked for cattle smuggling: J&K High Court
description: The High Court of Jammu and Kashmir and Ladakh recently quashed the preventive detention of a man accused in several cattle smuggling cases, while observing that there was no need to invoke the preventive detention law in the matter [Reham Ali v. UT of J&K].The authorities had justified the preventive detention by stating that the accused man's activities were a threat to public order, which is a ground on which the preventive detention law can be invoked. Justice Rahul Bharti disagreed, obs
